description: A painting of a figure seated within a dark arched alcove or market stall, surrounded by displayed goods on a counter. The figure wears dark clothing and looks directly at the viewer. Before the merchant, various items are laid out — what appear to be breads, sweets, and glass jars. The background wall is rendered in textured yellows and greens suggesting old stonework. The interior is dim with the figure's face lit from the front. The style is somewhat flat and decorative with bold color areas.
